code: import{useMemo,useState}from'react';import{Link,useParams}from'react-router-dom';import{useProducts}from'../hooks/useProducts';import{useCart}from'../context/CartContext';import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";export default function ProductDetails(){const{id}=useParams();const{products,loading}=useProducts();const{addToCart}=useCart();const[quantity,setQuantity]=useState(1);const[added,setAdded]=useState(false);const product=useMemo(()=>products.find(item=>String(item.id)===String(id)),[products,id]);if(loading){return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"page-shell page-feedback",children:"Loading product details..."});}if(!product){return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"page-shell",children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("section",{className:"empty-panel",children:["Product not found. ",/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Link,{to:"/products",children:"Browse all products"})]})});}const handleAdd=()=>{addToCart(product,quantity);setAdded(true);window.setTimeout(()=>setAdded(false),1600);};return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"page-shell",children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("article",{className:"details-card",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("img",{src:product.image,alt:product.title,className:"details-image"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("p",{className:"details-meta",children:["Category: ",product.category]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h1",{className:"details-title",children:product.title}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("p",{className:"details-description",children:product.description}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("p",{className:"details-price",children:["$",product.price.toFixed(2)]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"details-qty-row",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("label",{htmlFor:"qty-input",children:"Qty"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("input",{id:"qty-input",className:"details-qty-input",type:"number",min:"1",value:quantity,onChange:event=>setQuantity(Math.max(1,Number(event.target.value)||1))})]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{type:"button",className:"button button-success",onClick:handleAdd,children:"Add to Cart"}),added&&/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("p",{className:"cart-toast",children:"Added to cart"})]})]})});}
